definition:
1. to bore, pierce through , (Odyssey by Homer):—;Pass., τὰ ὦτα τετρυπημένος having  one's ears pierced for earrings , (Xenophon Historicus); ψῆφος τετρυπημένη the pebble of condemnation which had a hole in it , (Aeschines Orator) 
2. τρ. τῷ ποδὶ τὴν βελόνην to force  the point through  the foot, [variant datesAnthology Palantina (ML)
